summary: Iteration 129: DnD Status PATCH endpoint and frontend fix verification complete. All 8 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verification confirms: 1) StrictMode REMOVED from index.js, 2) Full card is drag handle with cursor-grab class, 3) stopPropagation on click handlers, 4) handleDragEnd implements optimistic update + PATCH + rollback, 5) Preventivi stored in separate acceptedPrevs state.

critical_code_review_comments: DnD fix is complete and correct - StrictMode removed, full-card drag handle, stopPropagation on clicks
PATCH endpoint validates against KANBAN_META keys and correctly returns 422 for invalid statuses
Board view properly segregates preventivi (is_preventivo flag) from commesse for clean DnD indices
seed_data_creation: Test commesse created and cleaned up automatically during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: DnD fix chain verified: 1) StrictMode removed from index.js, 2) dragHandleProps applied to entire CommessaCard div (not just grip icon), 3) stopPropagation on title click, ChevronRight click, Trash click, 4) handleDragEnd does optimistic update → PATCH /commesse/{id}/status → rollback via fetchBoard() on error. All 7 Kanban statuses work: preventivo, approvvigionamento, lavorazione, conto_lavoro, pronto_consegna, montaggio, completato.
